productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Brown Semi Formal Shoe
description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal loafers with a square toe design from red tape add that extra bounce to your step. Perfect for those who love to slip in and out of their footwear with ease, these loafers offer comfort and style at its best. Team them with jeans and chinos for that perfectly relaxed look. Upper Slightly distressed leather upper for added durability and style Square toe design for a more comfortable Fit Hidden elastic gores on either side of the lace closure for a more versatile fit Laceless design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug fit Stitch detailing for increased style and added structure Brand name on lateral side of midfoot Leather uppers for durability and comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Fabric footbed and inner for better breathability and all-day comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Zig-zag pattern on the forefoot and heel with textured lugs for improved traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
